subtitle: Your Calorie Tracker
welcomeText: Welcome to FitUp—your personal companion for tracking calories and eating smarter.

quickLogging.title: Quick Logging
quickLogging.description: No complicated steps, just straightforward tracking that fits perfectly into your day.

deepInsights.title: Deep Insights
deepInsights.description: Understand your carbs, proteins, and fats so you can make better health choices.
